summary: Updated the progress-site trophy total from 290 to 293 in ProgressPanel.svelte so trophy progress percentages use the correct denominator. The PR was a one-line tooling/site correction with no comments or review discussion in the provided slice.
what_changed: Changed the ProgressPanel.svelte constant TROPHY_COUNT from 290 to 293.
Left EVENT_COUNT at 51 and did not otherwise alter progress formatting or site logic.
The change affects progress-site calculations that use trophy_count divided against the trophy total.
smart_moves: Kept the fix minimal and localized to the progress panel constant, avoiding unnecessary churn in the progress-site code.
Corrected the denominator used for trophy completion reporting, which prevents misleading trophy progress percentages.
decomp_lessons: Progress dashboards and tooling constants need the same accuracy discipline as source decompilation work; incorrect totals can make project status appear wrong.
When a completion category has a known canonical total, encode that value in one obvious place and update it directly when evidence changes.
naming_conventions: The progress-site uses uppercase constants such as EVENT_COUNT and TROPHY_COUNT for fixed completion totals.
The Svelte component imports or casts progressJson as Progress, then uses category-specific count constants for display calculations.
review_feedback: No review comments, issue comments, or reviewer feedback were present in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Where is trophy_count generated for tools/progress-site progressJson?
Are there any other hard-coded trophy totals in the repository?
What source established that Melee has 293 trophies for progress tracking?
